title: epidendrum lacertinum
intro: Epidendrum lacertinum, also known as the Iguana Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Epidendrum lacertinum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Traditionally, herbal preparations of the plant have been used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are brewed and consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
